title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign poses a significant threat to cloud-based infrastructure, potentially leading to service disruptions, data breaches, and financial losses. By exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines, attackers can rapidly propagate malicious code across cloud environments.
recommended_actions: Implement strict access controls and monitor CI/CD pipelines for unauthorized changes or unusual activity.
Regularly back up critical data and ensure backups are stored offline or in secure, isolated environments.
Deploy endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions and conduct frequent security audits of cloud infrastructure.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: Yubico webauthn-server-core (aka java-webauthn-server) 2.8.0 before 2.8.2 incorrectly checks a...
description: Yubico webauthn-server-core (aka java-webauthn-server) 2.8.0 before 2.8.2 incorrectly checks a function's return value in the second factor flow, leading to impersonation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-46419.

title: In OpenStack Ironic through 35.x before a3f6d73, during image handling, an infinite loop in...
description: In OpenStack Ironic through 35.x before a3f6d73, during image handling, an infinite loop in checksum calculations can occur via the file:///dev/zero URL.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in OpenStack Ironic allows an attacker to exploit an infinite loop during image checksum calculations, potentially leading to resource exhaustion and denial of service (DoS) on affected systems.
recommended_actions: Update OpenStack Ironic to the latest version that includes the patch for CVE-2026-44919 (commit a3f6d73).
Implement monitoring and resource limits to detect and mitigate potential DoS attacks caused by this vulnerability.
Restrict access to the affected image handling functionality to trusted sources only.

title: Insufficient sanitization of SQL queries in the `sqloptimizer` utility script allows SQL...
description: Insufficient sanitization of SQL queries in the `sqloptimizer` utility script allows SQL Injections on behalf of the root user if Slow Query logging is enabled.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-29206.

title: Android App "あんしんフィルター for au" provided by KDDI CORPORATION contains Cleartext Transmission of...
description: Android App "あんしんフィルター for au" provided by KDDI CORPORATION contains Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information (CWE-319) vulnerability. A man-in-the-middle attacker may access and modify communications transmitted in plaintext, potentially resulting in information disclosure or data tampering.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Android app 'あんしんフィルター for au' allows a man-in-the-middle attacker to intercept and modify sensitive information transmitted in plaintext, leading to potential data breaches, unauthorized access, or tampering of user communications.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the app to use secure communication protocols such as HTTPS with proper certificate validation.
Notify users of the vulnerability and recommend avoiding sensitive transactions until a patch is deployed.
Conduct a security audit of the app to identify and address any other potential vulnerabilities.

title:
Web::Passwd versions through 0.03 for Perl is vulnerable to RCE.

Web::Passwd is a small CGI...
description:
Web::Passwd versions through 0.03 for Perl is vulnerable to RCE.

Web::Passwd is a small CGI application for managing htpasswd files using the htpasswd command.

The user parameter is not validated or escaped, and is used as the last argument on the command line, allowing for command injection.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows for remote code execution (RCE) due to improper validation of user input, potentially enabling attackers to execute arbitrary commands on the server. This could lead to data breaches, unauthorized access, or complete system compromise.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to a patched version of Web::Passwd, or apply available security patches if provided by the maintainers.
Implement input validation and sanitization for all user-supplied parameters to prevent command injection.
Restrict access to the CGI application by implementing IP whitelisting or authentication mechanisms to reduce exposure.

description: Improper authorization checks of team members privileges allow a team member to escalate privileges to the team owner account.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32991.

title: SSL verification is disabled in the DNS Cluster system. This could allow for a malicious server...
description: SSL verification is disabled in the DNS Cluster system. This could allow for a malicious server to man-in-the-middle the request and capture credentials.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Disabling SSL verification in the DNS Cluster system exposes sensitive data, such as credentials, to interception by attackers via man-in-the-middle (MITM) attacks. This could lead to unauthorized access, data breaches, and potential system compromise.
recommended_actions: Immediately enable SSL verification in the DNS Cluster system to ensure secure communication and prevent MITM attacks.
Audit all systems and configurations to identify and remediate any other instances where SSL verification may be disabled.
Deploy network monitoring tools to detect and mitigate potential MITM attack attempts.

title: Quark Drive before 0.8.5 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the System...
description: Quark Drive before 0.8.5 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the System Configuration page where the template renders push_config key names using Vue.js's v-html directive without escaping. Authenticated attackers can inject HTML or JavaScript payloads as key names through the POST /update endpoint, which are persisted to disk and executed in the browsers of all authenticated users accessing the System Configuration tab, allowing session cookie exfiltration and arbitrary auth

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Quark Drive before version 0.8.5 allows authenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts that can exfiltrate session cookies or execute arbitrary code in the context of authenticated users. This could lead to account compromise, data theft, or unauthorized actions within the application.
recommended_actions: Upgrade Quark Drive to version 0.8.5 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Implement input sanitization and escaping mechanisms for user-supplied data, especially when using the v-html directive in Vue.js.
Conduct a security review of other components to identify and mitigate similar vulnerabilities.

title:
The ftpcp() function in Lib/ftplib.py was not updated when 
CVE-2021-4189 was fixed. While...
description:
The ftpcp() function in Lib/ftplib.py was not updated when 
CVE-2021-4189 was fixed. While makepasv() was patched to replace 
server-supplied PASV host addresses with the actual peer address 
(getpeername()[0]), ftpcp() still calls parse227() directly and passes 
the raw attacker-controllable IP address and port to target.sendport(). This patch is related to CVE-2021-4189.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8328.

title: Quark Drive before 0.8.5 contains a mass assignment vulnerability in the POST /update endpoint...
description: Quark Drive before 0.8.5 contains a mass assignment vulnerability in the POST /update endpoint that allows authenticated attackers to overwrite administrator credentials by posting an arbitrary webui object to the config_data dictionary. Attackers can exploit insufficient deny-list filtering to permanently replace stored login credentials, lock out legitimate administrators, and gain persistent access to all configured tasks, cloud tokens, and notification services.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-45229.

title: The locally served web site on the Garmin WDU (v1 1.4.6 and v2 5.0) allows a cross-site origin...
description: The locally served web site on the Garmin WDU (v1 1.4.6 and v2 5.0) allows a cross-site origin WebSocket hijacking attack. Among other uses, the WDU utilizes WebSockets to control settings, including administrative settings. This allows a network attacker to take full control of a WDU. To initiate an exploit of this vulnerability, the victim must (1) be utilizing a web browser on a multihomed host that has local interfaces on the Garmin Marine Network as well as another network, and (2) access a

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2025-27851.

title: The locally served web site on the Garmin WDU (v1 1.4.6 and v2 5.0) allows a reflected cross site...
description: The locally served web site on the Garmin WDU (v1 1.4.6 and v2 5.0) allows a reflected cross site scripting (XSS) attack. This allows an attacker on the local network segment to execute arbitrary JavaScript code within the context of the WDU webpage. Full administrator level access to the device is possible. To initiate an exploit of this vulnerability, the victim must execute two actions: (1) view a specific URL served by the WDU, and (2) click an element on the rendered page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an attacker on the local network to execute arbitrary JavaScript code, potentially leading to full administrator access to the Garmin WDU device. This could result in unauthorized control, data theft, or disruption of device functionality.
recommended_actions: Apply firmware updates or patches provided by Garmin to address the vulnerability.
Restrict access to the local network and ensure proper network segmentation to limit exposure.
Educate users about the risks of clicking unknown URLs and interacting with suspicious web pages.

title: The locally served web site on the Garmin WDU (v1 1.4.6 and v2 5.0) allows a symlink attack. If a...
description: The locally served web site on the Garmin WDU (v1 1.4.6 and v2 5.0) allows a symlink attack. If a malicious graphics package containing symlinks is uploaded, the web server follows the supplied links when serving content. No mechanisms to restrict those link targets to a specific area of the filesystem is enabled. This allows an attacker to retrieve arbitrary files from the device.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to exploit a symlink attack via malicious graphics packages, enabling unauthorized access to arbitrary files on the device. This could lead to data leakage, exposure of sensitive information, or further exploitation of the compromised system.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Garmin WDU software to a patched version if available, or contact Garmin support for guidance.
Restrict the upload of untrusted graphics packages and implement file validation mechanisms to prevent malicious content.
Monitor device logs for unusual activity and unauthorized file access to detect potential exploitation attempts.

description: A race condition in Grafana Live allows authenticated users with Viewer role to trigger a server crash by sending concurrent requests that cause a fatal map access error. This results in complete service unavailability requiring restart of the Grafana server.

A remote attacker can execute JavaScript in the victim's browser when the malicious c

title: A vulnerability in SQL Expressions allows an authenticated attacker to read arbitrary files from...
description: A vulnerability in SQL Expressions allows an authenticated attacker to read arbitrary files from the Grafana server's filesystem. Only instances with the sqlExpressions feature toggle enabled are vulnerable.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an authenticated attacker to exploit the sqlExpressions feature to read arbitrary files from the Grafana server's filesystem. This could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive configuration files, credentials, or other critical data stored on the server.
recommended_actions: Disable the sqlExpressions feature toggle if it is not required for your operations.
Apply the latest security patches or updates provided by Grafana to address CVE-2026-33380.
Restrict access to the Grafana server to trusted users and implement strong authentication mechanisms.

title: CVE-2026-41203 - CI4MS is a CodeIgniter 4-based CMS skeleton that delivers a production-ready, modular architecture w
description: CI4MS is a CodeIgniter 4-based CMS skeleton that delivers a production-ready, modular architecture with RBAC authorization and theme support. Prior to version 0.31.5.0, ci4ms Theme::upload extracts user uploaded ZIP archives without validating entry names, allowing an authenticated backend user with the theme create permission to write files to arbitrary filesystem locations (Zip Slip) and achieve remote code execution by dropping a PHP file under the public web root. This issue has been patched in version 0.31.5.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated backend users with theme creation permissions to exploit a Zip Slip vulnerability, potentially leading to remote code execution by writing malicious files to arbitrary locations. This can compromise the integrity of the CMS and expose sensitive data.
recommended_actions: Upgrade CI4MS to version 0.31.5.0 or later to apply the patch that mitigates this vulnerability.
Restrict theme creation permissions to trusted users only and regularly audit user roles and permissions.
Implement file upload validation mechanisms to prevent unauthorized or malicious file uploads.

title: CVE-2026-41202 - CI4MS is a CodeIgniter 4-based CMS skeleton that delivers a production-ready, modular architecture w
description: CI4MS is a CodeIgniter 4-based CMS skeleton that delivers a production-ready, modular architecture with RBAC authorization and theme support. Prior to version 0.31.5.0, ci4ms Backup::restore extracts user uploaded ZIP archives without validating entry names, allowing an authenticated backend user with the backup create permission to write files to arbitrary filesystem locations (Zip Slip) and achieve remote code execution by dropping a PHP file under the public web root. This issue has been patched in version 0.31.5.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41202.

title: CVE-2026-41201 - CI4MS is a CodeIgniter 4-based CMS skeleton that delivers a production-ready, modular architecture w
description: CI4MS is a CodeIgniter 4-based CMS skeleton that delivers a production-ready, modular architecture with RBAC authorization and theme support. This issue has been patched in version 0.31.5.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41201.

title: CVE-2026-41142 - OpenEXR provides the specification and reference implementation of the EXR file format, an image sto
description: OpenEXR provides the specification and reference implementation of the EXR file format, an image storage format for the motion picture industry. From versions 3.0.0 to before 3.2.9, 3.3.0 to before 3.3.11, and 3.4.0 to before 3.4.11, there is an integer overflow in ImageChannel::resize that leads to heap OOB write via OpenEXRUtil public API. This issue has been patched in versions 3.2.9, 3.3.11, and 3.4.11.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41142.

title: CVE-2026-40004 - There exists an openssl.cnf privilege escalation vulnerability in ZTE Cloud PC client uSmartview. An
description: There exists an openssl.cnf privilege escalation vulnerability in ZTE Cloud PC client uSmartview. An attacker can execute arbitrary code locally and escalate privileges.

title: CVE-2026-4807 - The Appointment Booking Calendar plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in vers
description: The Appointment Booking Calendar plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in versions up to and including 1.6.10.6. This is due to a flawed authorization logic in the nonce_permissions_check() method combined with the public exposure of a site-wide reusable nonce. The plugin exposes a public_nonce value through the /wp-json/ssa/v1/embed-inner endpoint, which is accessible to unauthenticated users. The appointment deletion endpoint at /wp-json/ssa/v1/appointments/{id}/delete and /wp-json/ssa/v1/appointments/bulk use a permission check that accepts requests containing both an X-WP-Nonce header (with any arbitrary value) and an X-PUBLIC-Nonce header (with the valid public nonce). When the X-WP-Nonce validation fails, the function falls back to validating the X-PUBLIC-Nonce without properly rejecting the request. Since the public_nonce is exposed to all unauthenticated visitors and is site-wide (not user-specific or appointment-specific), attackers can obtain it and use it to view details of arbitrary appointments, including the public_edit_url, or delete arbitrary appointments by ID. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to view, delete or modify any appointment in the system, disclosing sensitive appointment data, causing service disruption, and loss of booking records.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4807.

title: CVE-2026-6222 - The Forminator Forms plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in versions up to a
description: The Forminator Forms plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in versions up to and including 1.51.1. This is due to the `processRequest()` method in `Forminator_Admin_Module_Edit_Page` (admin/abstracts/class-admin-module-edit-page.php) dispatching sensitive module-management actions — including export, delete, clone, delete-entries, publish/draft, and bulk variants — after only a nonce check, without ever verifying that the current user holds the `manage_forminator_modules` capability. The nonce used (`forminator_form_request`) is unconditionally embedded in the global `forminatorData` JavaScript object and localized on every Forminator admin page, including Templates and Reports pages accessible to users who explicitly lack module-management permissions. Because `processRequest()` is invoked during the `admin_menu` action hook — which fires before WordPress enforces page-level capability checks — a user whose Forminator role is restricted to Templates or Reports can craft a valid POST request targeting any published module and successfully trigger the vulnerable actions. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers with subscriber-level access (or any custom low-privilege Forminator role) to export the complete internal configuration of arbitrary forms/polls/quizzes (including notification routing, integration credentials, and conditional logic), delete modules, delete all submissions/votes, clone modules, or bulk-change publish/draft status.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6222.

title: CVE-2026-40003 - ZTE ZX297520V3 BootROM contains a vulnerability that allows arbitrary memory writes via USB. Attacke
description: ZTE ZX297520V3 BootROM contains a vulnerability that allows arbitrary memory writes via USB. Attackers can exploit the lack of target address validation in the USB download mode to write data to any location in BootROM runtime memory, thereby overwriting the stack, hijacking the execution flow, bypassing the Secure Boot signature verification mechanism, and achieving unauthorized code execution.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-40003.

description: Tor before 0.4.9.7 has an out-of-bounds read when an END, a TRUNCATE, or a TRUNCATED cell lacks a reason in its payload, aka TROVE-2026-011.
